headline: Anthropic’s Just Triggered Another SaaS Sell-Off: Are Software Stocks Uninvestable?
summary: Investors have watched AI reshape one industry after another. Now Anthropic’s latest move has software-as-a-service (SaaS) stocks feeling the heat again. On Friday, shares of cloud and edge infrastructure names plunged as traders priced in the threat from Claude Managed Agents. Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) tumbled 16.6%, Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) dropped 13.5%, and DigitalOcean Holdings (NYSE:DOCN) slid ... Anthropic’s Just Triggered Another SaaS Sell-Off: Are Software Stocks Uninvestable?

headline: Akamai Collapse: Did Anthropic Just Kill Its Prospects? I Think Not
summary: Akamai Technologies experienced a sharp sell-off after Anthropic launched Claude Managed Agents. Find out why AKAM stock is a hold.
